data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. ASTON BOREALIS was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 2.5 lengths third (16.98) over 300m at this track. Top prospect. 2. FRED'S FAST has first look around here after a moderate run last time, finishing fifth at Shepparton over 390m behind Storm Shadow (22.66). Cannot be underestimated. 1. EZARD DASH was safely held last time out, finishing seventh at Shepparton over 390m behind Aston Major (23.06) in a Maiden. Solid formlines coming through her last run. Should be thereabouts. 6. LITTLE SPLINTER was in the money last start at big odds - poses a threat again.","runners":[3,2,1,6],"exclusive":false}
